mapper.select: SELECT * FROM fine_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND is_paid = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM fine_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND is_paid = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fine_record (student_id, borrow_record_id, amount, days, is_paid, create_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{borrowRecordId}, #{amount}, #{days}, #{isPaid}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE fine_record SET student_id = #{studentId}, borrow_record_id = #{borrowRecordId}, amount = #{amount}, days = #{days}, is_paid = #{isPaid} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE fine_record SET is_paid = 1 WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND is_paid = 0 ORDER BY create_time LIMIT 1
